message:
Fix release workflow: add toolchain param, update macOS runner

- Add explicit toolchain: nightly to dtolnay/rust-toolchain action
- Update macOS x64 runner from retired macos-13 to macos-15-large

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -50,7 +50,7 @@ jobs:
             artifact_name: rich_rust-macos-arm64
           # macOS x64
           - name: macOS x64
-            os: macos-13
+            os: macos-15-large
             target: x86_64-apple-darwin
             artifact_name: rich_rust-macos-x64
           # Windows x64
@@ -63,8 +63,9 @@ jobs:
       - uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683 # v4.2.2
 
       - name: Install Rust toolchain
-        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@56f84321dbccf38fb67ce29ab63e4754056677e0 # nightly
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
         with:
+          toolchain: nightly
           targets: ${{ matrix.target }}
 
       - name: Cache cargo registry and build
@@ -215,7 +216,9 @@ jobs:
       - uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683 # v4.2.2
 
       - name: Install Rust toolchain
-        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@56f84321dbccf38fb67ce29ab63e4754056677e0 # nightly
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+        with:
+          toolchain: nightly
 
       - name: Publish to crates.io
         if: ${{ env.CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN != '' }}
